title: Contact
description: If you have questions, feedback, copyright concerns, or compliance-related requests about AI Image Splitter, contact us by email. We usually reply within 48 hours.

intro.title: Get in Touch
intro.content: Email is currently the only way to reach us. We review every message manually and respond to support questions, copyright concerns, compliance requests, and general feedback as quickly as possible.

topics.title: What You Can Contact Us About
items: Questions about using the tool or feedback on features
Privacy Policy or Terms of Service questions
Site errors, compatibility issues, or access problems
Other requests related to AI Image Splitter

responseTime.title: Response Time
responseTime.content: We usually reply within 48 hours after receiving your email.

includeInfo.title: What to Include in Your Message
includeInfo.content: To help us review your request more efficiently, please include:
items: The page or feature you were using
A short description of the issue or request
Your device, browser, or operating system if relevant
A screenshot or error message if one is available

additionalNote.title: Additional Note
additionalNote.contentBeforePrivacyLink: AI Image Splitter is a browser-based image splitting tool. Image processing happens locally on your device by default, so we cannot view images processed in your browser. If your request involves data handling, you can review our
additionalNote.contentBeforeTermsLink: If you want to understand the rules for using the service, you can also review our
